src: 📱 A template for your next React Native project: Expo, PNPM, TypeScript, TailwindCSS, Husky, EAS, GitHub Actions, Env Vars, expo-router, react-query, react-hook-form.
ja: 次の React Native プロジェクト用テンプレート: Expo、PNPM、TypeScript、TailwindCSS、Husky、EAS、GitHub Actions、環境変数、expo-router、react-query、react-hook-form 対応
